recommendations.title: Purple Noon
recommendations.overview: Tom Ripley is a talented mimic, moocher, forger and all-around criminal improviser; but there's more to Tom Ripley than even he can guess.

recommendations.title: Elena Undone
recommendations.overview: The wife of a pastor who preaches against homosexuality embarks on an affair with a female writer.

recommendations.title: 2 Days in Paris
recommendations.overview: Marion and Jack try to rekindle their relationship with a visit to Paris, home of Marion's parents — and several of her ex-boyfriends.

recommendations.overview: Two people meet each other after missing the last train home, leading to a beautiful relationship over five years.
